summary: Analyzed logos-notation.sty and identified notation requirements for ModelChecker paper. Recommended selective import (~25 macros) plus 15 new ModelChecker-specific macros. Identified mathabx package conflict with sn-jnl template. Created complete preamble section with all notation macros.

artifacts.summary: Supplementary research on notation macros: complete mapping table, compatibility analysis with sn-jnl, and recommended preamble section
